extra.indexDef: CREATE INDEX idx_products_name_lower ON app.products USING btree (lower(name::text))

objects.body:
SELECT p.product_id,
    p.name,
    count(oi.item_id) AS order_count,
    sum(oi.qty) AS total_qty
   FROM app.products p
     LEFT JOIN app.order_items oi ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name;
objects.name: mv_product_stats

objects.body:
SELECT o.order_id,
    o.customer_id,
    o.status,
    count(oi.item_id) AS item_count,
    sum(oi.total_price) AS total_amount
   FROM app.orders o
     LEFT JOIN app.order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
  GROUP BY o.order_id, o.customer_id, o.status;
objects.name: v_order_summary

objects.body: CREATE TRIGGER trg_audit_order_update AFTER UPDATE ON app.orders FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION app.audit_fn()
objects.name: trg_audit_order_update

objects.body:
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE app.proc_cancel_order(IN p_order_id integer)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $procedure$
BEGIN
    -- writes app.orders
    UPDATE app.orders SET status = 'cancelled' WHERE order_id = p_order_id;
END;
$procedure$
objects.name: proc_cancel_order

objects.body:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION app.audit_fn()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- writes app.audit_log
    INSERT INTO app.audit_log (order_id, old_status, new_status)
    VALUES (OLD.order_id, OLD.status, NEW.status);
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$
objects.name: audit_fn
fn_dynamic_search

objects.body:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION app.fn_inner()
 RETURNS bigint
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
    SELECT count(*) FROM app.orders;
$function$
objects.name: fn_inner

objects.body:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION app.fn_place_order(p_order_id integer, p_customer_id integer, p_product_id integer, p_qty integer)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_price numeric(10,2);
BEGIN
    -- reads app.products
    SELECT unit_price INTO v_price
    FROM app.products
    WHERE product_id = p_product_id;

    -- writes app.orders
    INSERT INTO app.orders (order_id, customer_id, status)
    VALUES (p_order_id, p_customer_id, 'pending');

    -- writes app.order_items
    INSERT INTO app.order_items (item_id, order_id, product_id, qty, unit_price)
    VALUES (p_order_id * 100, p_order_id, p_product_id, p_qty, v_price);
END;
$function$
objects.name: fn_place_order

objects.body:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION app.fn_wrapper()
 RETURNS bigint
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
    SELECT app.fn_inner();
$function$
objects.name: fn_wrapper
